entities.canonical_id: sql:function:bioseq.create_query_target_sample_table(text,integer,bigint,double precision,bigint,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,bigint)
entities.normalized_signature: bioseq.create_query_target_sample_table(text,integer,bigint,double precision,bigint,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,double precision,bigint)
entities.summary: DOC0274: creates a USING bioseq table mirroring the bench generator's (query, target) pairs with ground-truth metadata. Each row has the same reference as `target` and a mutated fragment as `query`; aligners are expected to find the query inside the target at exactly [truth_target_start, truth_target_end).

DOC0264 Phase C: creates a USING bioseq table with n_sequences synthetic sequences of sequence_bp_size letters each. Only dna4 is supported in Phase C; other alphabets are rejected. Bounded RSS regardless of sequence_bp_size — fragments stream through insert_sequence_streamed.
Administrative setup/restart audit of one source-bound READY Format-6 generation, including exact metadata and directory/control/posting catalog row, byte, and CRC receipts.
DOC0371 administrative cold-benchmark proof: validate one source-bound READY revision-3 minimizer generation without reading payload extents or enabling the live ordinal-2 reader.
entities.return_type: TABLE(generation_id bigint, source_identity text, compatibility_checksum text, source_content_checksum text, database_oid oid, main_relfilenode oid, column_attno smallint, sequence_rowno bigint, locator_version smallint, bucket_idx smallint, shard_idx integer, num_fragments bigint, total_bp_size bigint, first_sub_row_no bigint, padding_letters integer, alphabet_code smallint, storage_unit_byte_width smallint, kmer_size smallint, window_size smallint, gpu_abi_version integer, segment_geometry_version smallint, position_segment_span_bp bigint, position_segment_count integer)

entities.summary: Enumerate every (user bioseq table, bioseq.seq column, registered index) triple, with index_type, update_policy (UPDATE_ON_INSERT/UPDATE_MANUALLY), derived on-disk size, and age since last successful build.
entities.return_type: TABLE(table_name regclass, column_attno smallint, column_name text, name text, index_type text, update_policy text, size text, age interval)
TABLE(sub_relation regclass, sidecar_relation regclass, column_attno smallint, bucket_idx smallint, shard_idx integer, bytes_written bigint, is_full boolean)

entities.summary: DOC0295: stream a FASTA/FASTQ file into a USING bioseq table, parsing the identifier (header) line into typed destination columns. One bioseq.seq column (required, typmod drives alphabet/width). header_format selects the dialect ('auto' detects); columns => ARRAY[(column_name, data_source)] maps a parsed field or 0-based positional index to a column. Unmapped NOT NULL columns must have a default. Builds policy-enabled on-insert indexes in one batched pass when bioseq.update_index_on_insert is on. Returns records loaded.

DOC0371: returns the v3 locator fields embedded in a bioseq.seq stub value: (version, bucket_idx, shard_idx, num_fragments, total_bp_size, first_sub_row_no, total_padding). For inline (non-stub) values returns zeros for the locator-only fields and the inline bp_size + padding.
entities.return_type: TABLE(version smallint, bucket_idx smallint, shard_idx integer, num_fragments bigint, total_bp_size bigint, first_sub_row_no bigint, source_epoch bigint, total_padding integer)

TABLE(backend_pid bigint, db_oid bigint, relfilenode bigint, sequence_rowno bigint, total_run_count bigint, resident_runs bigint, file_runs bigint, resident_run_bytes bigint, resident_peak_bytes bigint, spilled_run_bytes bigint, postgres_temp_file_bytes bigint, postgres_temp_file_count bigint, merge_reader_buffer_bytes bigint, merge_pass_count bigint, spill_count_from_pressure bigint, resident_demotions bigint, position_spill_bytes bigint, position_spill_count bigint, generation bigint, worker_build_ns bigint, pipeline_mode bigint, max_concurrency bigint, index_memory_cap_mb bigint, lazy_worker_shareable bigint)

TABLE(supervisor boolean, config_generation integer, pipeline_concurrency_mode text, min_threads integer, max_threads integer, current_threads integer, batches_scheduled bigint, batches_awaiting bigint, batches_processed bigint, queries_waiting bigint, queries_processed bigint, oldest_waiting_batch_age_secs double precision, queries_per_sec double precision, uptime_secs double precision, async_persist_jobs_waiting bigint, index_memory_reserved_bytes bigint)

entities.summary: Recompute (or create) the named metadata kind for the given table. Returns the number of entries written. Used to backfill metadata after bulk INSERTs were run with bioseq.update_index_on_insert = off.
